heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/57/Aston_Martin_Vantage_Roadster_%282017%29_Auto_Zuerich_2021_IMG_0428.jpg/1920px-Aston Martin Vantage Roadster (2017) Auto Zuerich 2021 IMG 0428.jpg
description: The Aston Martin Vantage spans three generations. The V8 Vantage (2005–2017) featured a naturally aspirated 4.3/4.7-litre V8 with a manual gearbox option. The 2018 relaunch brought a Mercedes-AMG 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 with 503 bhp. The 2025 facelift increased output to 656 bhp with revised styling.
